title: Turkish War of Independence
description: Political, military and treaty events from May 1919 through the final Lausanne deadline.

gate.label: Turkey holds Erzurum
Turkey holds Sivas
Within its three-round window and Turkey holds İstanbul

outcome.label: The Entente administration of Western Thrace ends

gate.label: Turkey holds Ankara, or Sivas after three delays
Assembly is active and Turkey holds an eligible western province
Assembly active, Greece fighting, Turkey holds Eskişehir

outcome.label: Greek army loses units at Eskişehir

gate.label: Greece still fights in Anatolia and has not collapsed

outcome.label: Greek Anatolian front is reinforced and entrenched

gate.label: Assembly active, Greece fighting, Turkey holds Ankara

outcome.label: Greek offensive freezes and permanently weakens

gate.label: Assembly active, Alexandropol signed, Armenian homeland restored and National Pact clear

outcome.label: Borders settle and both sides are confined by the peace

gate.label: Assembly active, Turkey holds the approaches, Britain holds İstanbul

outcome.label: İstanbul returns to Turkey and Britain redeploys

gate.label: Britain is not ascendant
Assembly is active
Greece is not ascendant
Assembly is active
Assembly is active

outcome.label: Caliphate state is abolished and Turkey draws a card

gate.label: Britain holds Baghdad or Mosul

outcome.label: British Mesopotamian territory passes to Iraq

gate.label: Caliphate abolished and Turkey holds an affected eastern province

outcome.label: Eastern garrisons and entrenchments are halved

gate.label: Assembly is active and Greece does not hold Ankara
Assembly is active and Armenia is not ascendant

outcome.label: Italian conquests return to homeland owners

gate.label: Assembly is active

outcome.label: France makes peace and returns its conquests

gate.label: No occupying power is ascendant
Assembly is active
Assembly is active and Turkey holds Ankara
Assembly is active and an occupier remains in the National Pact

outcome.label: Full mobilization and three-die combat begin

gate.label: Assembly is active and negotiated terms are available

outcome.label: End the campaign at the outer deadline
